purpose: Interacting-node convergence certification for the common square continuum n_eps.
certification: n_eps=2001 certified as the common square discretization for BOTH budgets: at interacting metal points its Z/D_occ/E_kin agree with the n_eps=8001 reference to <=1.04e-5 relative, >=100x below the 0.1% claim gate (and agree with n_eps=4001 to ~1e-5). Used for square Mg=1 AND Mg=3 in scan_matrix_v2, so both square budgets share one discretization.
